creator: dom@myrddin.demon.co.uk
text:
ucspi-tcp is a command line interface to the network.  It can be used to
create TCP servers and clients in shell scripts.  It is written by Dan
Bernstein and si particularly useful in conjuction with his qmail
package.

Note that because of Dan's dubious licensing terms, I have made this a
NO_PACKAGE port.

Fix: N/A
How-To-Repeat: 
Unshar, make, make install.
